positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration of a cosmic mountain range, composed of interlocking geometric shapes and stylized celestial bodies. The mountains should feature deep indigos, electric blues, and hints of neon violet, contrasting against a luminous, gradient background of deep space nebula. Incorporate stylized constellations forming recognizable animal shapes (like a saber-toothed cat or a soaring eagle) and small, scattered nebulae clouds rendered as delicate gold dust accents. The style should be contemporary, clean vector art with a retro-futuristic, mid-century modern influence, suitable for a single-color screen print or DTG transfer. Central composition, high contrast, perfect symmetry, crisp lines, extreme detail, matte finish.
